summary: The user is seeking recommendations for marketing and tech industry events, particularly those focused on AI and data analysis, as they aim to attend at least one networking event per month. They express interest in the AI Summit and the Data Science Conference, specifically the breakout sessions on AI in Marketing and AI Ethics and Governance, and inquire about the format and panelists of the discussions.
facts: The user has been living in the city for about 2 years. The user is interested in marketing and tech events that focus on AI and data analysis. The user prefers events that take place during the day or early evening. The user is particularly interested in attending the breakout session on "Building Trust in AI: Ethics, Transparency, and Accountability" with Dr. Rumman Chowdhury. The AI Summit will feature keynote speakers such as Dr. Fei-Fei Li and Yann LeCun. The Data Science Conference will include keynote speakers like Dr. Andrew Ng and Dr. Cynthia Breazeal. The panel discussion on AI ethics will include experts like Dr. Deborah Raji and Dr. Michael Kearns. The panel discussion will include a 15-20 minute audience Q&A session. The AI Summit will have a dedicated mobile app for attendees to connect and submit questions.
